core_mechanism: a Darboux/Bäcklund-type (Moutard) solution-generating transformation that maps a known solution of a nonlinear integrable equation to new solutions via a closed-form Pfaffian/determinant-type algebraic construction, generalized to noncommutative variables and governed by a Sylvester expansion identity
brief_reason: The abstract builds a Sylvester identity for a Pfaffian-like object (the quasiPfaffian) and uses it to define the Sylvester-Moutard transform, which generates new solutions of Moutard-transformable integrable systems from existing ones.
